integrations.name: Atomic Red Team
integrations.tamandua_role: low-level technique execution mapped to MITRE ATT&CK
integrations.notes: The runner detects Invoke-AtomicTest on Windows guests and falls back to safe commands when it is absent.

integrations.name: MITRE Caldera
integrations.tamandua_role: multi-step operation execution; Tamandua scores telemetry, alerts, and timeline evidence
integrations.notes: Use Caldera for multi-step operations. The Tamandua adapter should create an operation, record operation/adversary/ability ids, poll completion, then score Tamandua evidence by ability timestamp.

integrations.name: Prelude Operator
integrations.tamandua_role: operator-style endpoint test campaigns with Tamandua detection scoring
integrations.notes: Keep as optional wrapper; do not couple Tamandua evidence schema to Prelude output.

integrations.name: Custom Commands
integrations.tamandua_role: safe deterministic smoke/regression tests for core telemetry
integrations.notes: Used for driver core, endpoint health, NDR smoke, and deterministic non-destructive checks.

integrations.name: PCAP and Log Replay
integrations.tamandua_role: repeatable NDR/DNS/SIEM parser validation without live attack execution
integrations.notes: Useful for NDR and cloud/Kubernetes sensors where live execution is expensive or noisy.
